signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Unseating Bitcoin and Solana Amid U
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Unseating Bitcoin and Solana Amid U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Rally | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP led digital asset investment products with $119.6 million in inflows last week—its strongest since mid-December 2025—surpassing Bitcoin's $107.3 million and Solana's $34.9 million, boosting year-to-date XRP inflows to 7% of assets under management.[1]

signals.headline: Ripple Announces $33 Trillion Stablecoin Projection at XRPTokyo2026 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple Announces $33 Trillion Stablecoin Projection at XRPTokyo2026 | YES | MED confidence**  
Ripple unveiled a massive $33 trillion stablecoin projection in Tokyo, fueling XRP momentum across continents amid regulatory clarity and institutional appeal.[7]  
XRP ETPs saw $120 million weekly inflows earlier in April, shifting multi-asset ETF demand patterns.[3]

signals.headline: Market-Moving Significance:** This event could influence prediction markets related to Trump's public image, Vatican-U
signals.raw: Market-Moving Significance:** This event could influence prediction markets related to Trump's public image, Vatican-U.S. relations, and potential religious political blowback, though the deletion and Trump's alternative explanation may limit sustained market impact.
